target: 4. A Job That Hopes for Peace

Totsumura-san, how was it?
The response from the mainland…
Did you believe the story?
Uhh… I can't really say.
I see…
But in the end, it seems my desperate explanation paid off, and they realized the severity of the situation.
They promised to send reinforcements tomorrow morning.
Really?!
Yeah, that's one less thing to worry about.
All of this is thanks to me, doing my best to explain everything!
Doing your best to explain…?

Oh, and there was more than just talking to the mainland.
I also heard some other things.
Other things? What?
Mainland detective expected today—should've reached island by now, but no contact from mainland.
…Really?!

The local contact was also troubled.
Where in the world did they get that oil?
What happened to the detective, I wonder?

Well, we'll just have to wait for the reinforcements tomorrow.
…Be careful with your surroundings.
Shin, you shouldn't stay out too late.
Yeah, you're right.

Wait, hold on!
Are you two going back to Kofune?
Huh? Of course we are.
Is there something else?
There's something, but there's also nothing…
You're being vague.

~~~~~~~~!
It's nothing, nothing at all! Go home before it gets dark!

Okay then.
Then we'll be going…
Ah…
W-What is it?
It's nothing, nothing at all!
Uh, by the way, are you scared of me, Totsumura-san?

Of course not!
I'm a police officer who's a hero of justice!
Tonight, I'm staying at the station, praying for the island's peace.
But you should be patrolling instead of praying…

…Hey.
Leaving Totsumura alone, maybe that wasn't the best idea.
If Totsumura is being targeted by the Shadow, it'd be better if someone was with him…
You're right, but we shouldn't make any unnecessary moves.
If the Shadow is impersonating people, it's not strange for us to be watched.
If we act strangely here, it might put Totsumura-san in danger.
So, it's better for us to stay calm.
Yeah…

(If something happens to Totsumura-san…
I can't say I'm not worried.)

(But probably, Mio's Shadow just happened to talk to Totsumura-san
and killed him.)
(It wasn't that Totsumura-san was the target from the start.)
(We can't do anything about it.)
(But first, we need to meet the detective from the mainland.)
(To protect Mio…)
Shin, wait a second.

What's wrong?
Dinner will be ready soon.

No, that's not it.
I was thinking of going to Tokiko's house tonight…
Tonight?
Is it really that dangerous?
Well, we don't know when Mio's Shadow will show up.
I know that, but I have an important matter to attend to.
Can't it wait until noon tomorrow?

Tokiko said she has something to do tomorrow at noon.
So I don't have any time but tonight.

(There's also Sou there, so maybe it's safer
than being here.)
(Security there is probably better than ours.)
Okay, I'll give you a ride.
Really! Thank you, Shin!
So, what's this important matter?

It's about the kimono I'll wear on the festival day…
Practicing the way to wear it.
What? What's that?

It's nothing!
It's not related to you at all!
Maybe…

It's already getting dark.
…Sorry, coming at this hour.
It's fine.

(Just to be safe, I brought a knife…
I think it's safe with the Hishigatas, but…)
…You, Shin.
Huh?
About tomorrow…

Tomorrow?
Did something happen?

Ugh, you forgot already!
Tomorrow is the Hitogashima Summer Festival!!
Ah… Yeah, that's right.
(Honestly, I don't have time for this… but maybe it's actually convenient.)
(If the festival is busy, the Shadow might be less likely to act.)
You know, it's just a festival…
Mio!
Tokiko!?
I was worried you were late.

Really?!
…Sorry.
You were being sent by Shin?

Yeah, it's dangerous to go out alone.
Tokiko, you should be careful too.
You're right…
Shin! Someone's coming!
W-What if it's my Shadow…
Mio, Tokiko, hide behind me!
Y-Yes!

(Damn it!
Can I protect Mio and Tokiko on my own?)

(Calm down, first assess the situation!
Think clearly!)
Wii…
Huh?
Ah, you shouldn't be out this late.
Ugh…?!
…Smells like alcohol.
…Totsumura-san, how could you drink at a time like this?

The opposite! That's exactly why I'm sober.
…Hic.

Even though it's outside of work hours,
it's not appropriate for a police officer to be so drunk…
I was lonely, so it's unavoidable.

At a time like this, the only one who can soothe my heart
is <color=#GF_TIPS_001>Erika</color>, so it's natural to think that way.
<color=#GF_TIPS_045>Tsu</color> was out?

But I was told to leave by my mom.
Because other customers were getting sick of it.
What did you do?

I was just being kind and warned them.
There's a dangerous vagrant on this island right now.
It's better not to go out so easily.

But everyone looked so annoyed.
I never thought Erika would look at me like that…
(Probably, that conversation wasn't suitable for a drinking session…)

(But if you think about it, maybe it's not bad
to have given them a warning…)

Hey, Shin…
What do you think about the festival?

Yeah… If there's a big commotion,
people might not gather as much as expected.

(If it gets that bad…
It might be worse…)

Shin, thanks for giving me a ride.
Are you okay on the way back?

Yeah, I'm fine.
I'm with Totsumura-san.
Erika…
(I hope it's okay…)
Then, Tokiko, I'm counting on you to take care of Mio.

Yes, I understand.
I won't let my guard down.

So don't worry.
Leave everything after to me…
Yeah, take care of it.
Well, goodnight, Shin-chan.

Ah.
Goodnight, Tokiko-chan.
Yes… Goodbye, Shinpei-san.
